source_label: Micheli, Alonso & Fleuret, 'Transformers are Sample-Efficient World Models' (arXiv 2209.00588)
notes: Sample-efficient Atari agent that learns inside a discrete-autoencoder + GPT-like Transformer world model; styled as the real word 'iris' (the official repo is lowercase) — 'EYE-ris', not lettered out.
